name: rakshak-ai-root
description: Root orchestrator for the Rakshak AI web app, Node relay, and Python LangGraph agent

scripts.dev: npx concurrently -n "FRONTEND,NODE,AGENT" -c "cyan,green,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm start --prefix backend/backend-node" "cd backend/backend-python && set PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 && python -m uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8000"
scripts.dev:agent: cd backend/backend-python && set PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 && python -m uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8000
scripts.setup: npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend/backend-node && pip install -r backend/backend-python/requirements.txt
